_note: Locale additions for trip cost transparency. Synthesizer should merge these keys into src/locales/en.json and src/locales/vi.json. Template syntax uses double-curly braces ({{var}}) to match the existing interpolate() in src/lib/locale.tsx.

en.trip_cost_note: Estimate based on EVN public charging at 3.500 ₫/kWh and RON95 at 23.000 ₫/L.

vi.trip_cost_note: Ước tính theo giá sạc EVN 3.500 ₫/kWh và xăng RON95 23.000 ₫/L.
